chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D - 1245 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.4886/2026 2. For orders on office objection Nos.1, 2 & 4 3. For orders on CMA No.4887/2026 4. For hearing of main case 25.02.2026 Mr. Muhammad Haroon Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. ------------------------------------ 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. Earlier the petitioner has filed a petition bearing C.P. No. D-4560 of 2014, which was disposed of by way of order dated 21.12.2021, however, no specific directions were issued regarding the prayer of granting higher grade to the petitioner. Later a contempt application bearing CMA No.10665 of 2022 was filed, which was disposed of in terms of order dated 23.11.2022 with the following observations: “ After going through the order passed by this Court and the response/compliance filed on behalf of the Respondents, we are of the view that since no specific directions were given to grant any higher grade to the Petitioners; rather the Respondents were only asked to consider the case of the Petitioners, if otherwise, requirements of rules and regulations are fulfilled; therefore, no case for contempt is made out; hence, the application being misconceived is hereby dismissed. In the circumstances and in view of orders passed earlier, instant petition is misconceived and not maintainable. Consequently, it is hereby dismissed in limine along with the listed application, with no order as to costs. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
